title: 10 Disapproving or Approving a Branch Capture Deposit
body_text:
10	Disapproving or Approving a Branch Capture Deposit
10.1	Overview of Disapproving or Approving a Branch Capture Deposit
There are four Branch Capture user types: Capture Users, Reviewers, Supervisors, and Administrators. Based on how you assign user types, a userГўВҖВҷs tasks, experiences, and responsibilities vary. See Section 8.2, Branch Capture Workflows and User Types, for more information. The procedures in this chapter apply to Reviewer Users and/or Reviewer Users who are also assigned other Branch Capture user types (e.g., Capture User and/or Supervisor User).
Reviewer Users are responsible for reviewing a Capture UserГўВҖВҷs deposits. Reviewer Users either disapprove a deposit that requires correction by the Capture User who created or is assigned the deposit or approve it for processing.
Note:	Disapproving and/or approving deposits doesnГўВҖВҷt apply to Capture users who are also assigned the Reviewer and Supervisor user types. For those users, deposits transmit to Central 1 when the user selects ГўВҖВңCompleteГўВҖВқ. See Section 8.2, Branch Capture Workflows and User Types, for more information.
The procedures in this section are guidelines. You should also refer to your internal procedures for processing Branch Capture deposits. You can only disapprove or approve deposits in an Open-Balanced state. See Section 9.14, Reviewing a Branch Capture Deposit, for deposit state descriptions.
10.2	Disapproving or Approving a Branch Capture Deposit
Disapprove or approve a Capture UserГўВҖВҷs deposit as follows:
Log in to Branch Capture as described in Section 9.3, Logging in to Branch Capture.
Search for and open the appropriate deposit as described in Section 9.6, Searching for and Viewing a Branch Capture Deposit.
Select the List of Deposits drop-down menu to choose the appropriate date range (if required). The default is ГўВҖВңTodayГўВҖВқ. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select the Deposit Timeframe
Tip:	Use the State column filter to display only open-balanced deposits. Select the filter, enter ГўВҖВңbalancedГўВҖВқ in the State Contains field, then select
Apply
. See Figure 2 and Figure 3. Select the ГўВҖВңXГўВҖВқ on the State column to clear the filter. Alternatively, select the State column header to sort deposits by state.
Figure 2: Select the State Column Filter
Figure 3: Filtering the Deposit List to Display ГўВҖВңBalancedГўВҖВқ Deposits
Select the Edit icon on the appropriate deposit. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select the Appropriate Deposit
Review the deposit carefully. See Section 9.14. Reviewing a Branch Capture Deposit, for more information. DonГўВҖВҷt approve a deposit if an incorrect item is included for the deposit currency (e.g., CAD item in a USD deposit).
Disapproving a Deposit
Disapprove a deposit as follows:
Add a note to the deposit (optional but recommended). You can use notes to describe errors, provide correction instructions, or provide feedback on a deposit (e.g., add instructions for the Capture User on how to correct and re-submit the deposit). See Section 9.12, Adding and Viewing Branch Capture Deposit Notes, for more information.
Note:	If there are notes from the Capture User on the deposit, a symbol displays. Review the note as described in Section 9.12, Adding and Viewing Branch Capture Deposit Notes.
Select
Disapprove
, then
OK
. See Figure 5. The deposit state updates to ГўВҖВңOpen-DisapprovedГўВҖВқ.
Figure 5: Disapprove a Deposit
Advise the Capture User that youГўВҖВҷve disapproved the deposit. If youГўВҖВҷve added a note, the Capture User can refer to it to correct the deposit. If you donГўВҖВҷt add notes, instruct the Capture User how to correct the deposit. Once the Capture User corrects the deposit, they must complete it for review and approval.
Approving a Deposit
Approve a deposit as follows:
Select
Approve
, then select
OK
to confirm. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Select Approve
Supervisor Users must transmit approved deposits to Central 1 for processing. See Chapter 11, Transmitting a Branch Capture Deposit, for procedures.
END
